name: Elf
summary: Long-lived and graceful. Quick and clever, but physically frail.

traits.name: Elven Immunities
traits.summary: Immune to magic sleep effects; +2 saves vs enchantments.

traits.name: Elven Magic
traits.summary: +2 caster level checks to overcome SR; +2 Spellcraft to identify magic items.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.summary: Proficient with longbow, longsword, rapier, shortbow.
